questions.title: Single MCQ
questions.prompt: Which model type predicts a continuous value?

questions.title: Multi-Select
questions.prompt: Select all statements that are true about PCA. Inline math works like <math>P(Y | X)</math>.

options.text: It preserves as much variance as possible in early components.
It uses class labels to maximize separation.

questions.title: Open Question With Structured Content
questions.prompt: Explain what this code calculates: def precision(tp, fp): return tp / (tp + fp) Display math works too: \mathrm{precision}=\frac{TP}{TP+FP} Images use local or remote paths: /absolute/path/to/question-image.png

answer.expectedText: Precision is the proportion of predicted positives that are true positives.
